attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   ST.LINE_FLOW_ID,
                   ST.HEADER_ID,
                   ST.LINE_ID,
                               ST.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,
                   ST.ERP_LINE_ID,
                   ST.ORG_ID,
                               ST.ORDERED_ITEM,
                   ST.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
                   ST.ITEM_CATEGORY,
                               ST.LINE_NUMBER,
                   ST.LINE_TYPE,
                   ST.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
                               ST.ORDERED_QUANTITY,
                   ST.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
                   ST.USAGE_QUANTITY,
                               ST.OFFER_QUANTITY,
                   ST.PRICING_QTY_TO,
                   ST.MINOR_LINE_AMT,
                               ST.OFFER_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
                   ST.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
                   ST.EXT_NET_PRICE,
                               ST.MAX_UNIT_SALEPRICE,
                   ST.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
                   ST.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
                               ST.ROUNDED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
                   ST.NET_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG,
                               ST.CHARGE_TYPE,
                   ST.PRICE_LIST_VERSION,
                   ST.BILLING_MODEL,
                               ST.DELIVERY_METHOD,
                   ST.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
                   ST.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
                               ST.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
                   ST.INSTALL_SITEUSE_ID,
                   ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
                               ST.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
                   ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
                   ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
                               ST.PREVIOUS_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
                   ST.PROVISION_REFERENCE_ID,
                               ST.REFERENCED_ID,
                   ST.PROVISION_REQUIRED,
                   ST.ACTION_TYPE,
                               ST.ACTION_SUB_TYPE,
                   ST.SELL_TYPE,
                   ST.MONTHLY_RECURRING_REVENUE,
                               ST.INITIAL_TERM,
                   ST.RENEWAL_TERM,
                   ST.PREPAY_TERM,
                               ST.TRUE_UP_TERM,
                   ST.INITIAL_TERM_TO,
                   ST.PREPAY_TERM_TO,
                               ST.TERM_LENGTH,
                   ST.QUOTE_NUMBER,
                   ST.REQUESTED_START_DATE,
                               ST.CONTRACT_START_DATE,
                   ST.CONTRACT_END_DATE,
                   ST.CHARGE_START_DATE,
                               ST.CHARGE_END_DATE,
                   ST.ESTIMATED_START_DATE,
                   ST.MANUAL_ACCEPTED_DATE,
                               ST.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
                   ST.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOID,
                               ST.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEID,
                   ST.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
                               ST.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
                   ST.END_CUSTOMER_CHANNELID,
                               ST.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
                   ST.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEID,
                               ST.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
                   ST.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
                               ST.SHIP_TO_CHANNELID,
                   ST.CREATION_DATE,
                   ST.CREATED_BY,
                               ST.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
                   ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
                   ST.CANCELLATION_REASON,
                               ST.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
                   ST.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
                   ST.EXCEPTION_MSG,
                               ST.RATE_TABLE_URL,
                   ST.PO_LINE_REFERENCE,
                   ST.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
                               ST.SERVICE_END_DATE,
                   ST.SERVICE_START_DATE,
                   ST.LICENSE_NUMBER,
                               ST.BUNDLE_ID,
                   ST.EXTENDED_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
                   ST.BUNDLE_TYPE,
                               ST.FULFILLMENT_SYSTEM,
                   ST.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN_AMOUNT,
                               ST.BUSINESS_SCENARIO,
                   ST.ECC_NUM,
                   ST.LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
                               ST.RENEW_COUNTER,
                   ST.MONTHLY_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
                               ST.FULFILLMENT_METHOD,
                   ST.AUTO_ACCEPT,
                   ST.LEADTIME_DATE,
                               ST.MONTHYL_SUB_CREDITS,
                   ST.MONTHLY_NET_PRICE,
                   ST.ESHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,
                               ST.ACTIVATION_SYSTEM,
                   ST.RENEW_LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
                               ST.BUNDLE_LINE,
                   ST.MONTHLY_SUB_CREDITS,
                   ST.UNIQUE_ID,
                               ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS,
                   ST.RENEW_LEADTIME_DATE,
                               ST.MONTHLY_NP_EXCL_CREDIT,
                   ST.UNIT_NETPRICE_INCL_CREDIT,
                               ST.END_COMPLETED_DATE,
                   ST.ORIGIN_SERVER,
                   ST.IMRR,
                               ST.LEGACY_UNIQUE_ID,
                   ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
                   ST.PREVIOUS_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
                               ST.ARR,
                   ST.NRR,
                   ST.ON_PREMISE_ROLE,
                   ST.ORIG_SYS_LINE_NUMBER,
                               ST.REMOVED_LINE_FLAG,
                   'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
                   ST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
                               ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
                   ST.HYBRID_OFFER_FLG,
                   ST.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
                               ST.REQUESTED_START_DTM,
                   ST.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT,
                               ST.PRICING_TERM,
                   ST.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
                           ST.MIGRATION_FLAG,
                                    ST.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER,
                      ST.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID,
                               ST.MIGRATED_DEAL_ID,
                           ST.CANCEL_TYPE,
                   ST.TRIAL_PERIOD_DURATION,
                               ST.EXPIRATION_DATE,
                ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
                   ST.RTR_ELIGIBLE,
                               ST.TRUE_FORWARD_FLAG,
                  ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
                ST.APPLIED_BUYING_PROGRAM,
                               ST.ELA_FLG,
                ST.TRANSFER_FLAG,
                  ST.SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID,
                               ST.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_LINE_ID,
                               ST.ORIGINAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
                               ST.ORIGINAL_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
					ST.REMAINING_TERM, /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
			       ST.PREVIOUS_REMAINING_TERM, /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
				   
				    /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
					ST.MAGIC_KEY,  				   
					/* ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
				    ST.ACV_FLAG,
                    ST.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,
                    ST.ACV_AMOUNT,	
					ST.TERM_START_DATE,
					ST.TERM_END_DATE,
					    /* END OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
				    ST.TERM_BOUND_CREDIT  /* Q1FY21 Annuity Rel */
					,ST.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLG  /* Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
					,ST.CANCELLED_FLAG
					,ST.REQUEST_DATE
					,ST.SHIPMENT_NUMBER
					,ST.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
					,ST.OPTION_NUMBER
					,ST.ORDER_NUMBER
					,ST.CISCO_SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE
                                ,ST.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE
					,ST.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE	
,ST.SHIPPED_QUANTITY	   
,ST.INVOICED_QUANTITY
,ST.CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME
,ST.RELATED_SKU_NAME
 /*Q3FY21 annuity release*/
  ,ST.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE
  ,ST.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM
,ST.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE
,ST.ITEM_TYPE /* ADDED AS PART OF CBM */
,ST.EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG /*Q3FY21 annuity release*/
/* ADDED BELOW TWO AS PART OF CBM MAY REL*/
,ST.MFG_PO_ORG_ID
,ST.SHIP_FROM_ORGID_CLOUD
/* Added as part of Athena June REl*/
,ST.CONSUMPTION_FULFILLMENT_MAPPING
,ST.CONSUMPTION_MODEL
,ST.SUBSCRIPTION_BUNDLE_TYPE
,ST.CONSUMPTION_PERCENTAGE 	/*Added as part of Athena Sep release */
,ST.SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP_ID    
,ST.FLEXUP_FLAG
,COALESCE(ST.ENT_AGREEMENT_ID ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGREEMENT_ID
,COALESCE(ST.ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM
,COALESCE(ST.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(ST.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(ST.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT
,ST.REFERENCE_TRANSACTION_ID    	/* Added as part of Q1FY22 Annuity Oct release --mahhr*/
,ST.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG
,ST.USER_INTENT /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
,ST.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,ST.THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,COALESCE(ST.ATR_LINK_ID,-999) AS ATR_LINK_ID/*feb13th iACV*/
,ST.SK_EA_DIGITIZATION_PROPOSAL_ID /*feb13th iACV*/
,ST.FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT /*Added as part of CBM March Rel*/
,ST.TOPMODEL_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*This Column is Added for GROGU March Release*/
,ST.PLAN_NAME /*This Column is Added for GROGU March Release*/
,ST.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
  ,ST.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER
  ,ST.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER /* ADDED AS PART OF MARCH 23 RELEASE*/
  ,ST.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG
  ,ST.ANCHOR_CONTRACT_NUMBER
  ,ST.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_CONFIRMDATE
  ,ST.ESTIMATE_ID
  ,ST.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID
  ,ST.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE
  ,ST.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
  ,ST.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added MAR 2024 release */
  ,ST.PROVISION_INFO_EMAIL
  ,ST.BUYING_PROGRAM_TRANSACTION_TYPE
  ,ST.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE
  ,ST.DUO_ACCOUNT_ID
  ,ST.ACTION	/*Added as part of EPIC 8216 */
  ,ST.PRICE_PROTECTION	
  ,ST.ITEM_QUANTITY_CHANGE
  ,ST.PRODUCT_COVERAGE_LINE_IDS
  ,ST.LINK_SO_CONTEXT
  ,ST.COVERED_PRODUCT_SO_NUMBER  
  ,ST.PO_NUMBER 
  ,ST.TRANSACTION_TYPE
  ,ST.BPA_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
  ,ST.SERVICE_ONLY_PURCHASE
  ,ST.CX_SUPPORT_SUB_TYPE
/*added below attributes as part of AIP Splunk June 2025 release*/ 
  ,ST.EXCEPTION_DESCRIPTION
  ,ST.PARTNER_INVOLVEMENT
  ,ST.INVOICE_DATE
  ,ST.SEASONAL_YEAR
  ,ST.CHANGE_SUBTYPE
  ,ST.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,ST.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,ST.RENEWAL_TYPE
,ST.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
,ST.TRANSACTION_CODE
    FROM       (          SEL *         FROM    $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL )ST                  
    LEFT JOIN (         SEL HEADER_ID,RESELLER_BID   FROM    $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL )SSO                    
        ON ST.HEADER_ID = SSO.HEADER_ID                  
    LEFT JOIN        (         
        SELECT   SALES_ORDER_KEY,
                               SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
                               SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
                               COALESCE (SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)  AS SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW                    
        FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER                   
        WHERE     SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW <> -999
		/*performance recommendations 07-10-2020*/
        AND COALESCE (SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
                SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) IN (SEL HEADER_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
        ) NESS                    
        ON NESS.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW = ST.HEADER_ID                  
    LEFT JOIN        (         
        SELECT   COALESCE (SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT)  TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
                                               SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                    
        FROM       $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE                   
        WHERE     TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID <> -999
		/*performance recommendations 07-10-2020*/
        AND COALESCE (SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
                SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) IN (SEL  TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
        ) NSOL                    
        ON NSOL.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID  --AND NSOL.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT  LINE_ID,
                END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
                SHIP_TO_ORG_ID 
        FROM    $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL
        WHERE LINE_ID IN (SEL  TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
        ) ELOL                    
        ON ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID                   
    LEFT JOIN( 
        SELECT   ITEM_KEY,
                BK_PRODUCT_ID ,RU_SBSCRPTN_OFFR_TYPE_CD
        FROM     $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1 ,
                $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL  ST1     
        WHERE   NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ST1.ORDERED_ITEM     
        GROUP BY 1,2,3) NP                    
        ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ST.ORDERED_ITEM                     
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT  ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,
                SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT 
        FROM     $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE                    
        WHERE   SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT IN (SEL  END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID  FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)    
        GROUP BY 1,2     )NECALU_END                    
        ON (NECALU_END.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ST.
            END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)                  
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT   ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,
                SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE                 
        WHERE   SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT IN (SEL SHIP_TO_ORG_ID FROM   $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)      
        GROUP BY 1,2  
            ) NECALU_SHIP                    
        ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ST.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID)                  
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT  ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY ,
                SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  
       --Performance recommendations		
         WHERE  SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT IN (SEL END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID   FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL)
        GROUP BY 1,2     )NECALU_END_MN                    
        ON (NECALU_END_MN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT =ELOL.
            END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID)                
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT  ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,
                SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  
        --Performance recommendations		
        WHERE   SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT IN (SEL SHIP_TO_ORG_ID  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL)   
        GROUP BY 1,2     ) NECALU_SHIPMN                    
        ON (NECALU_SHIPMN.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = ELOL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID)                       
    LEFT JOIN ( 
        SELECT  CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
                SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ,
                EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  NCA_SOLD1,
                $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SSO1     
        WHERE   NCA_SOLD1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SSO1.RESELLER_BID     
        GROUP BY 1,2,3     ) NCA_SOLD                    
        ON NCA_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SSO.RESELLER_BID                
    LEFT JOIN ( 
        SELECT  PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
                BK_PARTY_ID_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS1,
                $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  NCA_SOLD1     
        WHERE   NCPS1.BK_PARTY_ID_INT = NCA_SOLD1.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT         
        GROUP BY 1,2)NCPS                    
        ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT = NCA_SOLD.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT                      
    LEFT JOIN (         
        SEL    STAGE1.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
                 STAGE1.LINE_ID,
                 STAGE1.BUNDLE_ID         
        FROM       $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL   STAGE1   
		--, $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL  ST1
                WHERE     STAGE1.BUNDLE_LINE='Y'   
				--and STAGE1.LINE_REF_NUMBER =ST1.BUNDLE_ID
				--Performance recommendations
                AND LINE_REF_NUMBER IN (SEL BUNDLE_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
                group by 1,2,3 ) STAGE            
        ON STAGE.LINE_REF_NUMBER =ST.BUNDLE_ID                
    LEFT JOIN (            
        SELECT   COALESCE(SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
                    SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) LINE_ID,
                                    SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY            
        FROM       $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE  BUNDLE1     
		--, $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL STAGE1
                WHERE     LINE_ID <> -999    
				--and   STAGE1.LINE_ID=BUNDLE1.LINE_ID 
				--Performance recommendations
                AND LINE_ID IN  (SEL LINE_ID FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL WHERE BUNDLE_LINE='Y' )
            group by 1,2)  BUNDLE            
        ON STAGE.LINE_ID=BUNDLE.LINE_ID   --AND BUNDLE.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
                   LEFT JOIN   (            
        SELECT   SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT            
        FROM       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSON1 ,
                  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL ST1          
        WHERE     NSON1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=ST1.ERP_LINE_ID          
        GROUP BY 1 )  NSON              
        ON  NSON.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=ST.ERP_LINE_ID  --AND NSON.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT   BK_PRODUCT_ID, ITEM_KEY 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT 
		--Performance Recommendations
        WHERE   BK_PRODUCT_ID IN (SEL MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
        group by 1,2       )NP_MAP            
        ON NP_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT                
    LEFT JOIN  (         
        SELECT   SALES_ORDER_KEY,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT          
        FROM       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER 
		--Performance recommendations
        WHERE    BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL)
        group by 1,2)MSO           
        ON MSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =ST.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER                
    LEFT JOIN  (         
        SELECT   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT          
        FROM       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
		--Performance recommendations
        WHERE   SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IN (SEL MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL )
        GROUP BY 1,2) MSOL           
        ON MSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =ST.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID   
   /*below join added for  GROGU APRIL change*/
LEFT JOIN
        $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRD_TO_PRD_PLAN_LINK NPTP
	ON NPTP.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
	and NPTP.PLAN_NM=COALESCE(ST.PLAN_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
LEFT JOIN
      (select SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,sales_order_line_key from $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE 
           where ss_code='CG' ) SM_CG
  ON SM_CG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=ST.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID 
LEFT JOIN (select *from $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE where ss_code='CG') SM_cov_prod_cg
 on cast(SM_cov_prod_cg.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT as varchar(50))=ST.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
  
    WHERE       (NESS.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL)            
        OR    (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NULL            
        AND ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL)   --OR N_CCW.CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
          --OR BUNDLE_CCW.CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
            OR (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL          
        AND ST.ORDERED_ITEM IS NOT NULL)            
        OR (NECALU_END.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID IS NOT NULL)            
        OR (NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID IS NOT NULL)            
       /* OR (NECALU_END_MN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL)            
        OR (NECALU_SHIPMN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL) 
         OR (NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.HEADER_ID  IS NOT NULL)            
        OR (NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NULL            
        AND ST.HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL)  		*/
/* changed above conditions as below May16 April release*/
         OR (NECALU_END_MN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL AND  ELOL.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID  IS NOT NULL)       
         OR (NECALU_SHIPMN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NULL AND ELOL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID IS NOT NULL)       
         OR (NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL  AND SSO.RESELLER_BID      IS NOT NULL)       
         OR (NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NULL   AND SSO.RESELLER_BID  IS NOT NULL)  
         OR (STAGE.BUNDLE_ID IS NULL    AND BUNDLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL  AND ST.BUNDLE_ID IS NOT NULL)            
         OR (NSON.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL  AND ST.ERP_LINE_ID>0)            
        OR (NP_MAP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL AND ST.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT IS NOT NULL)            
        OR SSO.HEADER_ID IS NULL              
        /*OR (MSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL)            
        OR (MSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL)*/
		/* changed above conditions as below May16 April release*/
		  OR (MSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL and  ST.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER is not null)       
          OR (MSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL and ST.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID is not null    )
		  OR (ST.PLAN_NAME is not NULL and NPTP.plan_product_key is null)
		  OR(SM_CG.sales_order_line_key is null and  RU_SBSCRPTN_OFFR_TYPE_CD = 'SUCCESS_TRACK_SUB')
		  OR(SM_cov_prod_cg.sales_order_line_key is null and RU_SBSCRPTN_OFFR_TYPE_CD = 'SUCCESS_TRACK_SUB')

SELECT EX.LINE_FLOW_ID, EX.HEADER_ID,
   EX.LINE_ID, EX.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,
   EX.ERP_LINE_ID, EX.ORG_ID,
   EX.ORDERED_ITEM, EX.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
   EX.ITEM_CATEGORY, EX.LINE_NUMBER,
   EX.LINE_TYPE, EX.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
   EX.ORDERED_QUANTITY, EX.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
   EX.USAGE_QUANTITY, EX.OFFER_QUANTITY,
   EX.PRICING_QTY_TO, EX.MINOR_LINE_AMT,
   EX.OFFER_UNIT_NET_PRICE, EX.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   EX.EXT_NET_PRICE, EX.MAX_UNIT_SALEPRICE,
   EX.UNIT_LIST_PRICE, EX.UNIT_NET_PRICE,

,EX.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER

,EX.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
,EX.TRANSACTION_CODE
 FROM 
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL EX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
  ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL ST WHERE ST.LINE_ID=EX.LINE_ID)

SELECT 
 RANK() OVER 
    (ORDER BY SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT) +  SMLINE_MAX.MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 STLINE_BK.SS_CODE      SS_CODE,    
 STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT   SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
 USER         EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)     EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 STLINE_BK.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT,
 STLINE_BK.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT  ,
 STLINE_BK.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD 
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 DISTINCT 
 -6666    		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
 'OPL'   		SS_CODE,
 SXOLA.LINE_ID  SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT,
 SXOLA.LINE_ID  SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT  ,
 'OPL'          MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL SXOLA
 WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NULL)STLINE_BK,
 (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY),0)  MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT WHERE SS_CODE='OPL') SMLINE_MAX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM 
   (SELECT COALESCE(SSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,SSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT SSOL
	GROUP BY 1) SSOL 
    WHERE
-- SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
      --AND  SSOL.SS_CODE= STLINE_BK.SS_CODE 
	  SSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW =STLINE_BK.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT
      --AND SSOL.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD=STLINE_BK.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
	  )
